results.title: GP services for 4,000 new homes not running yet
results.description: The site in Rackheath is designed to serve one of the fastest growing communities in Norfolk.

results.title: Students head to European final with a bananas idea
results.description: The Harper Adams University students are the UK entry for a major entrepreneurship festival in Latvia.

results.title: World : Salah Scores As Egypt Beat New Zealand For First-Ever World Cup Win
results.description: VANCOUVER, June 22 (Bernama-dpa) -- Mohamed Salah scored a goal and assisted another as Egypt defeated New Zealand 3-1 to claim their first-ever World Cup win on Sunday, reported German Press Agency (dpa).

results.title: Zambia, South Korea forge football pact-Banda
results.description: Zambia’s Ambassador to South Korea, Andrew Banda, has announced plans to establish a football development partnership between Zambia and South Korea aimed at nurturing young talent and strengthening sports development in the country. Speaking during a briefing in Chipata, Ambassador Banda said discussions were underway with a South Korean football club linked to Hyundai to [...]
